ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-20-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-09-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-20-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MICHAEL MEAD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-20-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-09-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-07-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MICHAEL MEAD, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-07-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-24-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-11-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. *** NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B). *** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-08-2017 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance by or on behalf of Plaintiff nor an objection filed the Court ordered Case Dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Continued To Aug-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to August 8, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Michael Mead is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/11/2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2016 Continued To Feb-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to FEB-07-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; Clerk MOlopernes/YMazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
